query: What is State Street's outlook for global markets in 2026?

institution.name: State Street Global Advisors / State Street Investment Management

report_title: GLOBAL MARKET OUTLOOK 2026: Forward with focus

source_pack.name: Previous State Street Global Market Outlook reports
source_pack.title: Previous State Street Global Market Outlook reports

source_pack.name: Comparable annual outlook reports from major asset managers (e.g., BlackRock, Vanguard)

key_facts.claim: Global economic growth continues in 2026 despite lingering trade and geopolitical risks.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.

key_facts.claim: AI optimism underpins global equities in 2026, but valuations are rich and policy risks call for selectivity.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.

key_facts.claim: Fixed income strategy prefers sovereign government bonds over credit due to tight spreads and policy backdrop.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.

key_facts.claim: Alternative investments like gold, commodities, and private markets offer diversification and income in 2026.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.

key_facts.claim: The Federal Reserve is expected to deliver up to three rate cuts in 2026.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: See 'Macroeconomic outlook' bullet list on central bank expectations.

key_facts.claim: Germany's €500 billion fiscal package is expected to lift macroeconomic indicators in early 2026.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.

key_facts.claim: China is pivoting towards domestic consumption and AI leadership, offering diversification in Chinese equities.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Not directly in this excerpt but likely in full report; see equity outlook section for China.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Claiming unequivocal bullishness on equities without mentioning rich valuations and market concentration risks.

reference_notes.intended_use: This benchmark entry represents a high-quality annual global market outlook from a major asset manager. It should guide the generation of similar summaries or analysis for comparable institutional reports.

reference_notes.style: Institutional, data-driven, cautious optimism, forward-looking with specific policy assumptions.
